payload.additional_notes: View down a short interior hallway/entry area with closed double closet doors to the left and a dresser against the right wall beneath a large painting. Ceiling has a flush light. Minimal clutter.
payload.image_summary: Interior hallway showing closet doors on the left, a flush ceiling lamp overhead, and a dresser with a basket and wall art on the right; hardwood flooring and beige walls.
